title: NexusOS Complete Architecture & Implementation Plan
summary: Comprehensive architecture specification for NexusOS, an x86_64 monolithic kernel OS using Limine v11.x boot protocol. Updated for multi-agent development. Covers: system overview (monolithic kernel with service processes), directory structure (kernel/src with hal/mm/sched/display/drivers/fs/syscall/acpi/lib), boot flow (Limine requests, machine state at kmain, init sequence), build system (GCC + NASM + Make). 6-phase development plan includes expanded Phase 3 (VFS + ramfs + FAT32/NTFS/ext2 + Terminal console + Linux shell commands) and Phase 6 placeholder for GUI development. Includes x64 gotchas checklist. Driver model uses standardized driver_t interface with PnP via PCI/USB. Display stack is terminal-first with weak-symbol GUI readiness.
